# openwrt-hotplug module
> Documents the standard hotplug event environment variables injected by OpenWrt's netifd and network subsystems into scripts in /etc/hotplug.d/.
> **Total Context:** ~1412 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [openwrt-hotplug-skeleton.md](./openwrt-hotplug-skeleton.md): Structural map for openwrt-hotplug that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~497 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [openwrt-hotplug-complete-reference.md](./openwrt-hotplug-complete-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for openwrt-hotplug when a larger context window is available. (~1499 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md](../L2-semantic/openwrt-hotplug/hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md): Documents the standard hotplug event environment variables injected by OpenWrt's netifd and network subsystems into scripts in /etc/hotplug.d/. (~1412 tokens, l2-source)
